title: astragalus maurorum
intro: Astragalus maurorum, also known as the Mauritius milkvetch or Mauritius vetch, is a plant species belonging to the legume family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation due to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Astragalus maurorum include reducing stress and fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing the body's natural defense mechanisms. In herbal preparations, Astragalus maurorum is often available as dried root or leaf extracts, capsules, or teas, which can be used to support overall well-being.
